message:
fix: trim whitespace from GitHub token env vars to prevent 401 errors

When GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN is set via $(cat file) or similar, a
trailing newline gets included in the value. This causes the API
request to fail with 401 Unauthorized. Apply strings.TrimSpace() to
match the fix already applied in beads_rust.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
